name: Cognitive Mutagen (Greater)
description:
Activate A (manipulate)

Your mind becomes clear, but physical matters seem ephemeral.

Benefit You gain a +3 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society checks and all checks to . Your critical failures on Recall Knowledge checks become failures instead. You become trained in one Intelligence-based skill [Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society], chosen at creation.

Drawback You take a -2 penalty to weapon and unarmed attack rolls, Athletics checks, and acrobatics checks. You can carry 2 less Bulk than normal before becoming encumbered, and the maximum Bulk you can carry is reduced by 4.

Duration 1 hour.
